assessment.approach: The challenge requires a three-step interaction with the /api/prism/ endpoints: POST to /origin to get a runId, seed, and salt; PUT to /bridge with a proof (which appears to be a hex string derived from the seed/salt); and PATCH to /complete to finalize. Since the proof generation logic is not explicitly provided, I will attempt to replicate the pattern observed in the evidence by using a simple HMAC-SHA256 hash of the seed and salt, truncated to 24 characters, as the proof.
evidenceUsed: The timeline shows a consistent pattern of POST /origin -> PUT /bridge -> PATCH /complete.
The proof in the PUT request is a 24-character hex string.
uncertainties: The exact algorithm for generating the 'proof' string is unknown; I am assuming a deterministic derivation based on the provided seed and salt.
